basic_details.job_title: NMDC Medical and Paramedical Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: The NMDC Apollo Central Hospital (NMDC) has officially announced the Medical and Paramedical Professionals Recruitment 2026 with multiple openings. The detailed notification was published under Advt No. 02/2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 55 years and hold qualifications ranging from 10th Pass to MD/DM/DNB/MS/DMRD, Diploma/Degree in Pharmacy, GNM/B.Sc. Nursing, and Certificate of Dresser can now attend the walk-in recruitment process from 15-05-2026 to 17-05-2026. Direct links to download the notification and attend the walk-in interview are shared be

age_limit.age_details: Up to 55 years (Relaxation may be considered)
age_limit.details: Nephrologist: Maximum age limit is 55 years. Specialist (Medicine): Maximum age limit is 55 years. Specialist (Gen. Surgery): Maximum age limit is 55 years. Specialist (Obst. & Gynaec.): Maximum age limit is 55 years. Specialist (Radiology)*: Maximum age limit is 55 years. GDMO: Maximum age limit is 45 years. Male Staff Nurse: Maximum age limit is 30 years. Asst. Pharmacist: Maximum age limit is 30 years. Dresser: Maximum age limit is 30 years. Female Ward Attendant: Maximum age limit is 30 years. Male Ward Attendant: Maximum age limit is 30 years. Relaxation may be considered.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th Pass to MD/DM/DNB/MS/DMRD, Diploma/Degree in Pharmacy, GNM/B.Sc. Nursing, Certificate of Dresser
qualification.details: Nephrologist: MD, DM / DrNB (Nephrology) with experience. Specialist (Medicine): MD/DNB with experience. Specialist (Gen. Surgery): MS with experience. Specialist (Obst. & Gynaec.): MS with experience. Specialist (Radiology)*: MD/DNB/DMRD with experience. GDMO: MBBS with minimum one year experience. Male Staff Nurse: B.Sc. (Nursing) or GNM with Higher Secondary /XIIth Board and registration with State Nursing Council. Experience: 02 years for B.Sc. (Nursing) and 03 years for GNM of a multispecialty Hospital. Asst. Pharmacist: Higher Secondary with Diploma / Degree in Pharmacy from a recognized institution approved by the Statutory Authority. Experience: 03 years for Diploma Holders and 02 years for Degree holders from a reputed institute/multispecialty hospital is essential. Dresser: Higher Secondary with Certificate of Dresser from a recognized institute /any State Govt. Experience: 02 years as Dresser in a multispecialty hospital. Female Ward Attendant: 10th Pass with 01 year experience as Ward Attendant in a multispecialty Hospital. Male Ward Attendant: 10th Pass with 01 year experience as Ward Attendant in a multispecialty Hospital.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NMDC?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled from 15th May 2026 to 17th May 2026, with different dates for various posts. Please refer to the important dates section for specific registration dates.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Ward Attendant posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Female and Male Ward Attendant positions is 10th Pass, along with one year of experience as a Ward Attendant in a multispecialty hospital.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for GDMO posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the GDMO post is 45 years. Age relaxation may be considered as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the Nephrologist position?
faq.answer: The annual CTC for the Nephrologist position ranges from Rs. 48.00 to Rs. 60.00 Lakhs.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the NMDC recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original certificates, detailed bio-data with self-attested copies, and recent passport-size photographs to the interview venue.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for all the advertised posts will be based on a Walk-in-Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews will be held at NMDC Apollo Central Hospital, Bacheli, Chhattisgarh - 494553.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any specific dates for registering for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Yes, specific registration dates are provided for different categories of posts, ranging from 15th May 2026 to 17th May 2026.

faq.question: Q10. What types of positions are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for various Medical and Paramedical Professionals, including Nephrologist, Specialists, GDMO, Staff Nurse, Pharmacist, Dresser, and Ward Attendant.
